mapper.select:
SELECT arr.id, arr.staff_id, arr.check_time, arr.check_type, arr.verify_mode, arr.location_info, arr.wifi_ssid, arr.device_id, arr.is_encrypted,
si.name as staffName, si.images as staffImages,
di.dept_name, poi.name as positionName
FROM attendance_raw_record arr left join staff_info si on (si.id = arr.staff_id) left join dept_info di on (di.id = si.dept_id) left join position_info poi on (poi.id = si.position_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND si.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryForm.staffName},'%')
AND arr.check_type = #{queryForm.checkType}
order by arr.check_time desc
